title: Jay Franco Disney Pixar Cars Lightning McQueen Hooded Poncho Bath Towel 56cm x 130cm 100% Cotton Kids Changing Robe
features: SUPER SOFT & ABSORBENT - Hooded bath towel wrap measures 56cm x 130cm. This is made from 100% cotton terry ensuring softness while also being the highest quality in drying technology. Breathable fabric allows for absorbency while also being comfortable to touch.

FUN DESIGN MAKES FOR A GREAT GIFT - Bring home your favourite Cars character, Lightning McQueen with this hooded changing robe. Great for the bath, pool, or beach, your child will love drying off in this beautifully designed hooded towel wrap.
EASY CARE & LONG LASTING - This hooded towel wrap is fade resistant and stays soft through many washes. To clean, machine wash cold. To dry, air/tumble dry on low.
VERSATILE STYLING: Featuring your favorite characters and unique patterns, this changing robe adds vibrant colors and a fresh look to any holiday.
SHOP THE CARS COLLECTION - Enhance your child’s bath and bed experience with our other Cars products - Coordinating bedding, bath, and beach accessories available (sold separately).
description: This Disney Pixar Cars Lightning McQueen soft and absorbent hooded bath is a must have product! measures 56 x 130 cm and is made from 100% cotton terry ensuring softness while also being the highest quality in drying technology. Enjoy this Cars changing robe when you're out in the sun! Great for the bath, pool, or beach, your child will love drying off and becoming their favourite cartoon character, Lightning Mcqueen. To clean, machine wash cold. To dry, air/tumble dry on low. This is a gift to remember!
